title: COLLATE in ORDER BY clause breaks name resolution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER, y VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(y VARCHAR(255), z FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT 1 AS y FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.y = t2.y ORDER BY LOWER(y);
key_bug_features: COLLATE clause in ORDER BY causes parsing error
